title: Ancient Greeks Built A “Computer” 2,000 Years Ago — And It Predicted Eclipses
description: The Antikythera mechanism used gears and dials to track the movements of the sun, moon and planets.

title: As Iran conflict squeezes farmers, some are finding alternatives to fossil fuels
description: Across New England, farmers are finding that switching to renewable energy isn’t just a nice thing to have, it’s becoming a necessary part of their economic survival.

title: Homeric hangover cure: Greek claim over ancient bovine belly broth stirs feud with rival Turks
description: "The bovine leg contains 33.4% pure, consumable collagen — that's what helps greatly after surgery on the joints," the 53-year-old restauranteur says, citing medical experts. "But it also cures ulcers and other stomach ailments caused by alcohol consumption."
